title: cryptostylis acutata var. acutata
intro: Cryptostylis acutata var. acutata, also known as the tongue orchid, is a rare and exotic flowering plant native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems. Traditionally, the tongue orchid is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
